steps.title: Substitute x = 4 into the second equation
steps.content:
Since the graphs intersect at $(4, y)$, we know $x = 4$ must satisfy both equations. Substituting into the second equation:
$$6(4) + 2by = 56$$
$$24 + 2by = 56$$
$$2by = 32$$
$$by = 16$$

steps.title: Use the relationship to find a
steps.content:
Now substitute $x = 4$ and $by = 16$ into the first equation:
$$a(4) + by = 72$$
$$4a + 16 = 72$$
$$4a = 56$$
$$a = 14$$
That matches Choice D — $14$.
